market_overview.headline: Market showing stress fractures with SPY breaking down and only 34% of stocks in Full Bull mode.
market_overview.detail: SPY hit Bull Breakdown with bearish cross risks emerging, while QQQ maintains bullish structure but unstacked. BTC remains in Full Bear down -46% from fair value, creating risk-off headwinds.

momentum_themes.headline: Electronic Tech Leading Momentum
momentum_themes.detail: Memory and storage stocks dominating with massive spread scores led by SNDK at 31.11. Electronic technology showing strongest absolute momentum with WDC, MU, and GLW all posting 15%+ spread scores.

sector_analysis.headline: Resource Sectors Shine, Tech Services Crater

strongest.note: Perfect bullish structure with 90% Full Bull names averaging +13% vs 21W.
Mining complex firing on all cylinders with healthy pullback opportunities.
Small but perfectly bullish sector averaging +10.7% vs 21W.

weakest.note: Massive sector rotation out of tech services with 91% bearish structure.
Small sector completely bearish averaging -7.9% vs 21W.
Banking sector under pressure with 54% bearish despite some standout names.

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth tech into commodity/resource plays as inflation concerns resurface. Electronic hardware outperforming software dramatically.

items.text: SPY showing Bull Breakdown with bearish cross risks on both 8W/13W and 13W/21W
Technology services in historic rout with 91% bearish structure threatening broader market
BTC Full Bear structure at -46% from fair value signaling continued risk-off pressure
Only 34% Full Bull vs 26% Full Bear suggests deteriorating breadth despite selective strength
